metadata.description: Azure region for PostgreSQL Flexible Server.
Azure region for ACR, Redis, Key Vault, Log Analytics, Container Apps, API, worker, and N8N.
Environment name used in resource tags.

properties.configuration: [union(createObject('activeRevisionsMode', 'Single', 'registries', createArray(createObject('server', parameters('acrLoginServer'), 'identity', parameters('identityId'))), 'secrets', createArray(createObject('name', 'database-url', 'value', parameters('databaseUrl')), createObject('name', 'database-url-sync', 'value', parameters('databaseUrlSync')), createObject('name', 'redis-url', 'value', parameters('redisUrl')), createObject('name', 'celery-broker-url', 'value', parameters('celeryBrokerUrl')), createObject('name', 'celery-result-backend', 'value', parameters('celeryResultBackend')), createObject('name', 'api-key', 'value', parameters('apiKey')), createObject('name', 'callback-webhook-secret', 'value', parameters('callbackWebhookSecret')), createObject('name', 'melibox-user', 'value', parameters('meliboxUser')), createObject('name', 'melibox-pass', 'value', parameters('meliboxPass')), createObject('name', 'proxy-urls', 'value', parameters('proxyUrls')))), if(parameters('ingressExternal'), createObject('ingress', createObject('external', true(), 'targetPort', parameters('targetPort'), 'transport', 'auto')), createObject()))]

[union(createObject('activeRevisionsMode', 'Single', 'registries', createArray(createObject('server', parameters('acrLoginServer'), 'identity', parameters('identityId'))), 'secrets', createArray(createObject('name', 'database-url', 'value', parameters('databaseUrl')), createObject('name', 'database-url-sync', 'value', parameters('databaseUrlSync')), createObject('name', 'redis-url', 'value', parameters('redisUrl')), createObject('name', 'celery-broker-url', 'value', parameters('celeryBrokerUrl')), createObject('name', 'celery-result-backend', 'value', parameters('celeryResultBackend')), createObject('name', 'api-key', 'value', parameters('apiKey')), createObject('name', 'callback-webhook-secret', 'value', parameters('callbackWebhookSecret')), createObject('name', 'melibox-user', 'value', parameters('meliboxUser')), createObject('name', 'melibox-pass', 'value', parameters('meliboxPass')), createObject('name', 'proxy-urls', 'value', parameters('proxyUrls')))), if(parameters('ingressExternal'), createObject('ingress', createObject('external', true(), 'targetPort', parameters('targetPort'), 'transport', 'auto')), createObject()))]

osProfile.customData:
[base64('#cloud-config
package_update: true
packages:
  - squid
runcmd:
  - systemctl enable squid
  - systemctl restart squid
